agent.name: Micro CRM Agent
agent.description: Chat-first relationship operations agent that records notes, keeps next actions current, and stores follow-up drafts.

template.name: Micro CRM for Solo Operators
template.description: A read-only relationship portfolio backed by local SQLite and operated through chat/API writes.

secrets.name: APP_PASSWORD
secrets.description: Optional password for HTTP Basic Auth on /app and /app/api/*.

api.description: Read contact portfolio data or add a relationship note and next action.
Store a draft follow-up for a contact.
